name: Fishbowl Inventory & Manufacturing API
what_it_does: Fishbowl REST API for SMB inventory management and light manufacturing platform. Enables AI agents to manage inventory levels and warehouse locations, handle bills of materials and work orders, access purchase orders and vendor management, retrieve sales orders and customer data, manage multi-location inventory tracking, handle lot and serial number tracking, integrate with QuickBooks for accounting sync, retrieve manufacturing cost and production analytics, and connect inventory data with ecommerce platforms.
use_cases: Managing inventory levels and reorder points from supply chain automation agents
Tracking work orders and BOM manufacturing from production planning agents
Syncing purchase orders and vendor data from procurement automation agents
Integrating inventory with QuickBooks from accounting automation agents
not_for: Large enterprise manufacturing without SMB-scale inventory focus
Complex process manufacturing without discrete parts inventory model
Distribution without light manufacturing and BOM requirements
best_when: A small-to-mid-size manufacturer, distributor, or product-based business using Fishbowl wants AI agents to automate inventory management, purchase order workflows, work order tracking, and QuickBooks accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Inventory and manufacturing BOM data is proprietary. Automated reorder and purchase order creation can trigger significant financial commitments. QuickBooks sync automation must maintain accounting accuracy.

auth.notes: Fishbowl uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. REST API with basic documentation. No granular scope control. Legacy Java-based platform with newer REST API layer. QuickBooks Integration Server for accounting sync.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; perpetual license model
pricing.paid_tiers: One-time perpetual license; annual maintenance; cloud subscription option
pricing.notes: Orem, Utah. Founded 2001. Leading QuickBooks-integrated inventory platform. Used by 40,000+ businesses. Strong SMB manufacturing and distribution market. Perpetual license model with optional cloud. Competes with Katana and Cin7 for SMB inventory. Strong QuickBooks ecosystem integration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; basic documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated PO creation triggers real financial commitments — require approval workflows
No public MCP server — basic API key REST API with limited documentation
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Legacy Java platform — REST API is a newer layer; some legacy behaviors may surface
QuickBooks sync is critical — inventory changes must stay in sync with accounting records
No webhooks — polling required for all inventory and order status updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Inventory and manufacturing data. SOC2. API key only. US data residency. No scope granularity. Legacy platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Inventory and BOM data. SOC2. API key only. No scope granularity. Legacy platform with REST wrapper.
